---
title: "About"
image: family.jpg
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: telegram
      text: Telegram
      href: https://t.me/sergey_istomin
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sergeyistomin/
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sergey.istomin@gmail.com
---

I'm **Sergey Istomin** from Saint Petersburg, Russia — a Senior Python Developer and Tech Lead with over a decade in software development, system integration, and IT consulting. I lead engineering teams and ship Python in production: FastAPI backends, cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure, AI/LLM tooling (including MCP servers for AI agents), and security scanners for developer workstations. On the side I tinker with networking and reverse engineering — some of it ends up here as posts.

My family — my wife, two sons, and daughter — is my world. We bond over sports, especially swimming and skiing, and I cherish playful moments with my little princess. Together, we value education, tradition, and the pursuit of knowledge.

I hold a Master's degree in Computer Science and Management in Technical Systems, and I'm working toward a Private Pilot License (PPL).

## Curriculum Vitae

[Short CV — English](cv/short_cv_in_english.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[Short CV — Russian](cv/short_cv_in_russian.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[Full commercial experience](cv/full_experience_in_commercial_software_dev.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[Other strange experiences](cv/other_strange_expirience.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

A PDF version of the short CV is also available: [Sergey_Istomin.pdf](cv/short_cv_in_english.pdf).
